meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to leverage Git, Antigravity, and Claude Code to debug faster and impress clients as a professional freelancer.
content.answer_block: Stop manually hunting bugs. By integrating AI-driven Git workflows with Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform your repository into an intelligent debugging assistant. This approach maps code changes to errors in real-time, allowing you to resolve complex logic failures, ship faster, and maintain professional-grade stability for every client project.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. You’ve spent three hours chasing a ghost in the codebase, and the frustration is mounting. Every line you change seems to break two others, turning a simple feature request into a high-stakes nightmare. You aren't just losing time; you're losing professional credibility.

But what if your repository could talk back? By treating your Git history as a context-rich knowledge base, you can leverage AI to pinpoint the exact commit that introduced the regression. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about building a robust, AI-assisted architecture that turns chaos into a streamlined, repeatable development workflow.

steps.title: Establish Contextual Baselines
steps.description: Before debugging, ensure your current branch state is indexed so the AI understands the delta between 'working' and 'broken'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the recent git diff and identify logical inconsistencies between the current state and the last known stable commit.

steps.title: Isolate Regression via Git Bisect
steps.description: Automate the search for the specific commit that introduced the bug to narrow the AI's focus.
steps.antigravity_prompt: I am performing a git bisect. Here is the error log. Analyze the diffs for the identified bad commit and suggest a patch.
steps.claude_code_command: git bisect start; git bisect bad; git bisect good <last-stable-hash>

steps.title: Deep Codebase Auditing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the execution flow of the buggy function across multiple files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Trace the execution path of the function causing this error. Identify side effects that might be triggering the failure.

steps.title: Synthesize AI-Generated Patches
steps.description: Generate a precise fix that respects existing code patterns and style guides.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready patch that resolves the identified bug without altering existing business logic or breaking dependencies.

steps.title: Automated Validation
steps.description: Run unit tests against the new fix to ensure the bug is squashed and no new regressions were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the relevant test suite for this module and verify that the fix addresses the failing test cases.

pro_tips: Always commit your 'broken' state as a WIP branch before debugging so you can revert instantly if the AI suggestions go down a rabbit hole.
Use git-ignore strategically; ensure AI tools aren't indexing massive dependency folders that pollute the context window.
Tag your commits with 'AI-FIXED' to track which parts of your codebase have been audited by your AI stack for future maintainability audits.
When using Claude Code, always provide the specific error stack trace first; the AI performs 3x better with raw logs than with vague descriptions.
Configure your .gitattributes to exclude AI-generated config files from diffs, keeping your logs clean and focused on business logic.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI commands into a custom Makefile or shell alias to automate your debugging pipeline across all your freelance projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start mastering your workflow. Join the elite group of developers shipping bug-free production apps in half the time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
